title: gentianella detonsa subsp. lanceolata
intro: Gentianella detonsa subsp. lanceolata, also known as Lanceolated Gentianella, is a rare and endangered species of flowering plant in the gentian family (Gentianaceae). Traditionally, this plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Gentianella detonsa subsp. lanceolata are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, allowing for various herbal preparations to be used in traditional medicine.
